executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned gates are green; whole-stack certification blocked by external owner-loop residue (marketing stale evidence 4732+ min, blocked-channel-recovery at critical escalation with 870 consecutive repeats).
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: External blockers remain on marketing and unblocker loops. Architecture JSON is structurally complete with all required fields; topology matches live Gateway.

findings.title: Marketing independent verification stale at 4732+ minutes — still fail-closed
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification artifact is far past the 240-minute max-age threshold and last verdict remains fail.
findings.root_cause: Marketing owner loop is not producing fresh measurable outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption.

findings.title: Blocked-channel-recovery at critical escalation (870 consecutive repeats)
findings.mechanism: Health monitor escalation module detected 870 consecutive timeout repeats; current live topology shows 1 active timeout error on blocked-channel-recovery.
findings.root_cause: Blocked-channel-recovery job consistently times out at 600s budget; unblocker loop is its owner, not architecture.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology is clean at this snapshot (1 external error)
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection: 25 total, 25 enabled, 0 disabled, 1 error (blocked-channel-recovery timeout). All other 24 jobs green.

findings.title: Architecture verifier triple-pass chain confirmed green this run
findings.mechanism: Independent verifier (qualified_pass) → verifier (pass) → checker (AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK). All architecture-owned gates confirmed.

ordered_fix_plan.action: Refresh architecture JSON and MD with live topology (25 jobs), updated timestamps, fresh verifier/independent-verifier chain
Re-run independent verifier (qualified_pass) and architecture verifier (pass) to confirm green chain
Produce fresh marketing independent verification with measurable Codeberg-primary adoption evidence
Diagnose and repair blocked-channel-recovery timeout root cause (870 consecutive repeats)

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Updated checked_at timestamp, live_topology counts (25 jobs, 25 enabled, 0 disabled, 2 running), blocked-channel-recovery repeat count (870), marketing stale age (4732+ min). All structural fields present.
Independent verifier returns qualified_pass with 2 external blockers. Architecture verifier returns pass with no errors. Loop integrity both OK.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.
Blocked-channel-recovery root-cause diagnosis and repair by the unblocker loop.
